LanguageData.WVC_WorkModes_ResetButtonWarning: The settings will be changed, are you sure?
LanguageData.WVC_ToolTip_Setting: Before disabling, switch all mechanoid modes to vanilla. A restart is required to apply the settings.
LanguageData.WVC_Label_EscortIfEnemyWorkAndRecharge: Escort if enemy, work and recharge
LanguageData.WVC_ToolTip_BonusSetting: Bonus mode. It is disabled by default. Enabling is compatible with saves.
LanguageData.WVC_ToolTip_enableShutdownForAllMechanoi: If enabled, idle optimization will also affect vanilla modes.
LanguageData.WVC_ToolTip_enableSmartChargingForAllMec: If enabled, then the mechanoids will go to charge when they are not busy with anything, and not only when the charge runs out.
LanguageData.WVC_ToolTip_VanillaModeOptimizationWarni: Does not affect combat mechanoids, as their idle has been replaced with a simulated patrol.
LanguageData.WVC_ToolTip_enableShutdownSearching: If enabled, mechanoids will search for a mechanoid shutdown zone before shutdown.
LanguageData.WVC_ToolTip_enableEnemySearching: If enabled, in safe modes, mechanoids will check the map for enemies.
LanguageData.WVC_ToolTip_enableSearchingWarning: If you don't understand what this option does, leave it enabled.
LanguageData.WVC_ToolTip_enableSmartEscort:
If enabled, it allows you to select an escort target for mechanoids.
Restart required!
LanguageData.WVC_ToolTip_shutdownModeZonesOrSpots:
If enabled, zones will be used. Alternatively, spots. It is recommended to enable it.
This option is for advanced users. If you don't know what spots are, then leave it enabled.
Restart required!
LanguageData.WVC_ToolTip_useCustomShutdownBehavior: Vanilla shutdown is too stupid, but reliable. If you encounter bugs related to mechanoid shutdown, disable this option.
LanguageData.WVC_ToolTip_enableDormantMode:
If enabled, then when the mechanoid is in shutdown mode it does not consume bandwidth.
In case of performance problems, it is recommended to disable it.
Restart required!
LanguageData.WVC_Label_mechBandwithCostInDormantMode: Dormant mode bandwidth cost factor x{0}%
LanguageData.WVC_MechanoidShutdownZoneDesc: Mechanoids will return here before shutting down.
LanguageData.WVC_ShutdownZone_BasicDesc: Responsible for whether mechanoids with this type of work will be able to shutdown here.
LanguageData.WVC_WorkModes_allowAllGroupsDesc: Responsible for whether all mechanoids, regardless of the group, can use this zone.
LanguageData.WVC_MechanoidScavengeZoneDesc: In the "Scavenging" work mode, mechanoids will look for useful resources in this zone.
LanguageData.WVC_WorkModes_ChangeModDefaultMessage: {0} is not researched. Mode changed to {1}.
LanguageData.WVC_WorkModes_ChosenGroupDesc: Allows you to designate a group of mechanoids that will return to this zone.
LanguageData.WVC_WorkModes_ChosenMechanitorDesc: Allows you to assign a zone owner.
LanguageData.WVC_WorkModes_ResetOwnerDesc: Allows you to reset a zone owner.
LanguageData.WVC_WorkModes_RestrictZoneByGroupDesc: Allows you to limit the mechanoid's choice of zones to those specifically assigned to its group.
LanguageData.WVC_WorkModes_RestrictZoneByGroupInspect: Uses only zones of its group
